headline: The Trade Desk Appoints Vinny Rinaldi as Vice President of Client Strategy & Growth
summary: VENTURA, Calif., July 16, 2026--The Trade Desk, a leading advertising technology company, today announced that Vinny Rinaldi has joined the company as Vice President of Client Strategy & Growth. In this role, Rinaldi will partner closely with marketers to help them unlock greater value from data-driven advertising, navigate the rapidly evolving media landscape and accelerate business growth through the premium open internet. Rinaldi will report to Chief Operating Officer, Vivek Kundra.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Trade Desk (TTD) Expanding Retail Media Data And Leadership Bench
summary: The Trade Desk recently integrated SEVEN-ELEVEN JAPAN’s retail purchase data into its platform for advertisers in Japan, and expanded its leadership and board with the appointments of Kristi Argyilan as Chief Commercial Officer and Penry Price as director and committee chair. Together, these moves highlight how The Trade Desk is deepening its capabilities in retail data, measurement, and governance while adding senior talent with long experience in programmatic advertising and commerce...

headline: Trade Desk Inc (NASDAQ:TTD) Clears Peter Lynch's Growth at a Reasonable Price Screen
summary: Peter Lynch's GARP strategy identifies Trade Desk (TTD) as a strong buy: 21.22% EPS growth, PEG of 0.53, zero debt, and 77.83% gross margins at an attractive valuation.
